<div class="hcfe-content">

<div id="hcfe-content" role="main">

<div class="section primary-container">

<div id="page-width-container" class="page-width-container">

<div class="main-content">

<div class="section article-container" stats-ve="35">

# Tag site for child-directed treatment

<div class="article-content-container">

<div class="cc">

If you think that your website or mobile app is intended specifically
for children, please visit the
<a href="https://search.google.com/search-console/coppa" target="_blank"
rel="noopener">Tag for Child Directed Treatment</a> page to tag a site
or service that you would like Google to treat as child-directed in
whole or in part for the purposes of the [Children’s Online Privacy
Protection
Act](http://business.ftc.gov/privacy-and-security/childrens-privacy)
(COPPA). If you have not already added a site to Search Console, you
must first [add the site and verify
ownership](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/34592).

<div class="note">

<div class="no-margin">

Note that marking your site or app as child-directed does **not** affect
its ranking in Google Search results.

</div>

</div>

Keep in mind the following:

- You can tag an entire domain or portions of a domain (subdomain or
  subdirectory) for treatment as child-directed
- Any pages beneath a domain or directory are also covered by the tag.
- It may take some time for this designation to take effect in
  applicable Google services.
- Google may limit the number of domains or sub-domains you may include
  at any time.

For finer control over how your content is treated, you can also tag
individual ad units for treatment as child-directed. See the help center
for your product to learn more about proper tagging.

**Note: **Tagging individual ad units has immediate effect on the ad
served. An ad unit tag takes precedence over any applicable site-level
settings. 

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="sub-article-container shaded">

<div id="article-survey-container" class="article-survey-container"
stats-id="3221080" stats-ve="20" stats-visible-imp="">

<div class="promotion-image">

[![](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/iyJZOYB-OnYWs0GqA-QFmBPpjL0PJMB-XyfpVu95XL4xqzCh5XU7ZQdUMWAzmHvaIqI=w512)](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/9128669?hl=en&ref_topic=9128571)

href="https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/9128669?hl=en&amp;ref_topic=9128571"
class="promotion-title">New to Search Console?</a>

Never used Search Console before? Start here, whether you're a complete
beginner, an SEO expert, or a website developer.
